name: Jellied Horseradish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine horseradish, vinegar, and sugar in a large pot.
2. Stir until the ingredients are well combined.
3. Heat the mixture over medium-high heat until it reaches a full rolling boil.
4. Add the fruit pectin to the boiling mixture.
5. Continue stirring constantly until the mixture reaches another full rolling boil.
6. Boil for 1/2 minute, then remove from heat.
7. Allow the mixture to stand for 1 minute before proceeding.
8. Skim off any impurities that may have risen to the surface.
The Household Searchlight
